'''Nuswatta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Early in its history, Nuswatta was a [[theocracy]] ruled from the [[High Fane of Xo]] by hierophants, who practiced ritual sacrifice. One of the original member-worlds of the [[Kingdom of Cron]], it was [[Battle of Nuswatta|violently conquered]] by [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] and absorbed into [[Xim's empire|his empire]]. Xim built the famous [[Forbidden Gardens of Nuswatta/Legends|Forbidden Gardens of Nuswatta]] there, a royal retreat later considered one of the [[Twenty Wonders of the Galaxy]].

After the fall of Xim's empire in [[25,100 BBY]], the hierophants of Xo fled the planet to found a new stronghold where they would await the climactic battle between [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] that would usher in the end of time and the Perfection of Xo. The Tionese never heard from them again. The Forbidden Gardens slowly fell into ruin, and though legally only [[Cronese]] could visit them, in practice most Human visitors to the planet could bribe a guide to taken them there.

Nuswatta would eventually join the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It would continue to thrive as a world, eventually joining the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The planet was notably intolerant to [[Alien/Legends|Non-Humans]], though despite this [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] was once able to visit the Forbidden Gardens.
